item.title: Caribbean Queen
item.description: Jamaica Carnival will be from April 16th through April 20th. Brightly colored costumes donned by party revelers are the signature hallmarks of this celebration. This design is from GenX Carnival based in Miami

item.title: Another mediocre meme dump, pt 10
item.description:
Ten dumps. Nearly 50 memes in each dump. That’s so many memes (and so much cat tax) Part ten of whatever it takes to clear out my phone.
Damn, I had to redo one of my meme dumps because Imgur didn’t like one of the photos, and I think I lost the username of whoever animated this. If you see this, please comment so I can edit with credit to you.
I would probably use this for funsies.
“Shitlings” is now a part of my vocabulary
Honestly, same
I want the “FUCK DINNER” pants, for some reason.
Cat tax. Moose and her famous facial expressions.
I love her so much. For those of you who need more memes: Pt 9: https://imgur.com/gallery/JXM1eCu Pt 8: https://imgur.com/gallery/Ke5NzeP Pt 7: https://imgur.com/gallery/Y2rvJyq Pt 6: https://imgur.com/gallery/6rEEEH3 Pt 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/SwFgHwb Pt 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/bkj2EDi Pt 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/Gzae8C6 Pt 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/DciDY01 Pt 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/q9jvH2j Most viral edit: thanks all, I appreciate it! Send kitties and tiddies, I guess…
item.dc:creator: madcraftapothecaries

item.title: I Painted This Today!

Thanks for watching! View more of my process on my YouTube channel here: https://youtube.com/channel/UCkrQEkIvh1NBqHw9jB4Y0GA If you’re interested, My Etsy shop: www.etsy.com/shop/HaleyGrecoArtwork My Instagram: www.instagram.com/haley.greco.artwork Most Viral edit: Thanks so much you guys!!
Thanks for viewing my art! You guys are the best.

item.title:
Trolling from Finland
After reports that Russia was moving troops to the border with Finland, the Finns published a video of tractors moving to the border with Russia.
Well, the Ukrainian experience is now known around the world.
